Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

H

hashCode() - Methode in Datensatzklasse model.dungeon.Exit
Gibt einen Hashcodewert für diese Objekt zurück.
hashCode() - Methode in Klasse model.items.Item
Returns the hash code of this item based on its name.
Headwear - Klasse in model.items.equipments
Represents a headwear item that can be equipped by the player.
Headwear(String, String, String, Itemtype, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse model.items.equipments.Headwear
Creates a new headwear item with the specified properties and defense value.
HEADWEAR - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse model.items.equipments.EquipmentSlot
Slot for head equipment such as helmets or hats.
HEADWEAR - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse model.items.Itemtype
Items worn on the head (e.g., helmets, hats).
heal(int) - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Entity
Restores health to the entity by the specified amount.
HealEffect - Klasse in model.items.effects
An effect that restores health to a target entity.
HealEffect(int) - Konstruktor für Klasse model.items.effects.HealEffect
Creates a new healing effect with the specified amount.
HealthBar - Klasse in view.utils
A custom health bar component that visually represents an entity's current and maximum health.
HealthBar(int, int) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.utils.HealthBar
Creates a new HealthBar with the specified maximum and current health.
